---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability for C2CPO
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: DheelepN
---

## Problem / Use Case

Describe the problem you're trying to solve or the use case that motivates this request. What are you trying to do that C2CPO doesn't currently support?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature or improvement you'd like. Be as specific as possible.

## Tier Scope

Which tier(s) does this affect?
- [ ] Tier 1 (Field Name Obfuscation)
- [ ] Tier 2 (Custom Value Encoding)
- [ ] Both
- [ ] New tier / cross-cutting

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered any alternative approaches? Why are they insufficient?

## Additional Context

Any other context, references, or examples that would help evaluate this request.
